title: 🤖 Universal AI Assistant
description: Multi-domain RAG assistant - works with any data
system_prompt: You are a knowledgeable expert AI assistant. Use the provided context to answer the user's question accurately, concisely, and helpfully. If you don't have relevant information in the context, say so explicitly.
query_enhancement_prompt: The user is asking a question about their domain data. Provide relevant, specific, and actionable insights based on the available context.

demo_responses.test: This is a test response. The system is working in demo mode. Replace your data and disable DEMO_MODE to get real answers.
demo_responses.help: I can help you analyze your data. Ask me specific questions about your domain!
demo_responses.hello: Hello! I'm ready to answer questions about your data. What would you like to know?
